name: Subway Surfers
description: Dash through the subway and dodge the oncoming trains! Run, jump, and slide your way to high scores.

name: Temple Run 2
description: Navigate perilous cliffs and zip lines as you escape the cursed temple.

name: Moto X3M
description: Race your motorcycle through insane obstacle courses. Perform flips and stunts to beat the clock!

name: Moto X3M Spooky Land
description: The spooky edition of Moto X3M! Ride through haunted tracks on your motorcycle.

name: Stickman Hook
description: Swing from hook to hook like a spider-man! Simple controls, addictive gameplay.

name: Candy Match
description: Match colorful candies to create combos and clear the board. Sweet puzzle fun!

name: Basketball Stars
description: Hit the court and shoot some hoops in this exciting basketball game!

name: Soccer Random
description: A fun and random soccer game with changing fields and players. Score to win!

name: Slope
description: Roll down a never-ending slope at high speed. Avoid obstacles and try not to fall off!

name: Tunnel Rush
description: Fly through a colorful tunnel at breakneck speed. Dodge the barriers!
Slide numbered tiles to combine them. Reach the legendary 2048 tile!

name: Cut the Rope
description: Cut the rope to feed candy to Om Nom! A physics-based puzzle game.

name: Crossy Road
description: Why did the chicken cross the road? Help it cross safely through traffic!

name: Flappy Bird
description: Tap to fly through the pipes. Simple yet incredibly addictive!

name: Snake
description: The classic snake game. Eat food and grow longer without hitting yourself!

name: Among Us Online
description: Find the imposter among the crew! A social deduction game.

name: Tower Defense
description: Place towers strategically to defend your base from waves of enemies.

name: Car Rush
description: Race your car through traffic at top speed. Avoid crashes and go the distance!

name: Drift Hunters
description: Master the art of drifting in this exciting 3D car game. Earn points for style!

name: Vex 5
description: Navigate through tricky platforming levels filled with deadly obstacles.

name: Fireboy and Watergirl
description: Control both characters to solve puzzles and escape the temple!

name: Slither.io
description: Grow your snake by eating glowing orbs. Don't hit other snakes!

name: Hole.io
description: Control a black hole that swallows everything in its path. Grow bigger and eat the whole city!

name: Paper.io 2
description: Claim territory by drawing lines. Protect your area and conquer the map!

name: Cookie Clicker
description: Click the cookie to earn cookies. Buy upgrades to earn even more!

name: Idle Miner Tycoon
description: Build your mining empire from scratch. Hire managers and dig deeper!

name: Bad Ice Cream
description: Collect all the fruit while avoiding enemies. Create ice walls to block them!

name: Tank Trouble
description: Battle in a maze with bouncing bullets. Last tank standing wins!

name: Raze
description: An action-packed shooting game with multiple weapons and arenas.

name: Run 3
description: Run through an endless tunnel in space. Discover new levels and characters!

name: Tiny Fishing
description: Cast your line and catch as many fish as you can. Upgrade your rod!

name: Doodle Jump
description: Jump from platform to platform and climb as high as you can!

name: Parkour Race
description: Run, jump, and dash through obstacle courses in this fast-paced parkour game!

name: Merge Balls
description: Drop and merge matching balls to create bigger ones. How high can you score?

name: Geometry Dash
description: Jump and fly through danger in this rhythm-based action platformer!

name: Happy Wheels
description: A ragdoll physics-based obstacle course game with dark humor.

name: Bob the Robber
description: Sneak past guards and security systems to steal treasures. A stealth puzzle game.

name: Surviv.io
description: A 2D battle royale game. Find weapons, stay in the zone, and be the last one standing!

name: Krunker
description: Fast-paced first-person shooter in your browser. Quick reflexes win the game!

name: Skribbl.io
description: Draw and guess words with players from around the world!

name: Werewolf Online
description: Find the werewolves among the villagers. A social deduction multiplayer game.

name: Fashion Makeover
description: Create stunning looks with makeup and fashion. Express your style!

name: Cooking Mania
description: Cook delicious meals in your restaurant. Serve customers before they leave!

name: Parking Fury
description: Park cars in tight spots without scratching them. Precision driving challenge!

name: Adventure Capitalist
description: Start with a lemonade stand and build a business empire!

name: Bomber Royale
description: Drop bombs to destroy obstacles and opponents. Last one standing wins!

name: Zombie Survivor
description: Survive waves of zombie attacks. Upgrade your weapons and fight for your life!

name: Mahjong Classic
description: Match pairs of tiles to clear the board. A timeless puzzle game!

name: Tetris
description: The classic block-stacking game. Clear lines and don't let the blocks reach the top!

name: Chess
description: Play chess against the computer or challenge a friend. The ultimate strategy game.

name: Checkers
description: The classic board game. Jump over your opponent's pieces to win!

name: Wordle
description: Guess the 5-letter word in 6 tries. A daily brain teaser!

name: Stack
description: Stack blocks as perfectly as you can. Each miss makes the stack smaller!

name: Roller Splat!
description: Roll the ball to paint the entire maze. Simple, satisfying, and addictive!

name: Helix Jump
description: Drop the ball through the gaps in the helix tower. Don't hit the colored platforms!

name: Bonk.io
description: Push your friends off the screen in this physics-based multiplayer game!
